/usr/bin/c++ -W -Wall -pedantic -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-long-long -Wwrite-strings -Wpointer-arith -Woverloaded-virtual -Wno-variadic-macros -Wshadow -pipe -Qunused-arguments -DGL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION -stdlib=libc++ -std=c++11 -std=c++11  -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -ftree-vectorize -fno-math-errno -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libg4cmpHVeV.dylib -install_name @rpath/libg4cmpHVeV.dylib CMakeFiles/hvevLib.dir/src/HVeVActionInitialization.cc.o CMakeFiles/hvevLib.dir/src/HVeVConfigManager.cc.o
